Manage users

The legacy HTMX CRUD screen now has an Astro + Vue counterpart that talks directly to the documented /api/users/* contracts.

Protected Astro route

User management

The full CRUD surface now runs through Astro + Vue and the explicit /api/users/* contracts instead of HTMX fragments.
